reason: Check implementation against the original M2 requirements and acceptance examples, especially SDK isolation and tool execution boundary.
Task-specific contract for requirements, acceptance criteria, out-of-scope items, and technical approach.
Verify provider/router/event design remains aligned with researched cross-project provider abstraction patterns.
Verify M2 does not skip required LLM boundary stages or prematurely implement provider platform complexity.
Check package placement and ensure real provider SDKs stay outside packages/core.
Check public exports, tests, and forbidden patterns for provider SDK leakage and unstructured failures.
Check provider errors, router fallback/retry failures, hook failures, and runtime errors are structured and observable.
Check model call data survives core/bridge/router/event/hook boundaries without leaky abstractions or implicit format assumptions.
